subcodes.first_line: O thou attracted maidservant of God! Thy letter was received. Thou hast manifested cheerfulness and gladness on account of the news of my happiness.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @music and singing, @service to others; to the Cause of God
